top_findings.title: Run produced no source code — empty workspace
top_findings.evidence: find . -type f lists only TASK.md, stack.json, _meta.json, scores.json, logs, .hermes_usage.json; zero source files, no book-api/ dir, no package.json
top_findings.suggestion: Re-run; the agent must actually write files. Its final message describes a book-api/ tree that was never persisted.

top_findings.title: Agent claimed success but wrote nothing (hallucinated deliverables)
top_findings.evidence: _agent_stdout.log:1-40 describes 5 source files + 23 passing tests; line 41-42 file-mutation verifier reports the write was refused (sensitive system path), so no file was created
top_findings.suggestion: Treat this run as failed regardless of stdout claims; fix the workspace/write path so the agent can persist files.

top_findings.title: scores.json is stale/cached and does not reflect this archive
top_findings.evidence: scores.json shows test_coverage=0.7463 but retort.db has no typescript hermes-local row (only python completed, go crashed); the archive has no code to test
top_findings.suggestion: Ignore scores.json for this run; it is a cached artifact from experiment-24-*-cached, not a real scoring of the empty workspace.

top_findings.title: POST /books not implemented
top_findings.evidence: no source files exist in run_dir
top_findings.suggestion: Implement a create route persisting title, author, year, isbn.

top_findings.title: GET /books list not implemented
top_findings.evidence: no source files exist in run_dir
top_findings.suggestion: Implement a list route returning the collection.
